strengths.title: Effective Needs Discovery
strengths.evidence: Advisor asked about main goal, medical issues, previous attempts, work schedule to customize plan.

strengths.title: Budget Qualification
strengths.evidence: Advisor inquired about customer's monthly budget and aligned plan recommendation accordingly.

strengths.title: Professional Closing
strengths.evidence: Advisor booked free consultation, confirmed timing, and assured follow-up via WhatsApp.

improvements.title: Stronger Objection Handling
improvements.suggestion: Provide more confidence or alternative solutions when customer asked about no result guarantee.

summary: The advisor conducted a well-structured call with clear greeting, rapport building, thorough needs discovery, and appropriate budget qualification. The advisor demonstrated good product knowledge and professionalism throughout. The objection about result guarantee was handled adequately but could be improved with stronger reassurance. The call ended successfully with a booked free consultation and positive customer sentiment.
